options.vulkanimprovement.meshTerrainRen: Replaces vanilla solid and cutout terrain submission with the Vulkan Improvement mesh-shader terrain path.
options.vulkanimprovement.meshTranslucen: Routes translucent terrain through the mesh-shader path. Disabled by default until water ordering and blending match vanilla.
options.vulkanimprovement.meshletFrustum: Enables shader-side meshlet frustum culling. Leave this off while checking for edge-of-screen chunk holes.
options.vulkanimprovement.drawAllCapture: Draws all captured solid and cutout mesh terrain instead of the visible-list subset. This is a heavy diagnostic mode for chunk flicker.
options.vulkanimprovement.vanillaChunkVi: Applies vanilla chunk-section fade to mesh terrain. Disable only when comparing raw chunk streaming behavior.
options.vulkanimprovement.terrainFragmen: Applies Vulkan fragment shading rate commands to terrain when the device supports them.
